# About the author {-}

**Raban Heller** is a biomedical scientist working at the intersection of
biostatistics, clinical research, and data science. He maintains the
*[Strategy in R](https://r-heller.github.io/strategy-in-r/)* and
*[Methods in R](https://r-heller.github.io/methods-in-r/)* books in the
same series.

- ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8006-9742>
- GitHub: <https://github.com/r-heller>
- Website: <https://r-heller.github.io/website/>

For corrections or suggestions, please open an issue at
<https://github.com/r-heller/scientometrics-in-r/issues>.
